info.title: AcqDataReceiverAS API
info.description: The Acquisition Data Receiver Autonomous Service API is part of Acquisition 2.0 contract and handles data transfer and messages from LND to waters_connect MS as data system.

post.summary: Handle Job-Start request from Acquisition Controller
post.description:
This data transfer event creates a new draft version of a Sample Set.
An Audit entry log is written recording the success or failure of the Sample Set creation.
A 'SampleSetStarted' Job-State-Change message is posted to the Waters MessageBus.
            
Hidden Jobs - If a hidden job is detected then NoContent is returned, a Sample Set is not created.

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation**

500.description:
Internal server error

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

post.summary: Handle Job-End request from Acquisition Controller
post.description:
This data transfer event completes the Sample Set.
An Audit entry log is written recording the success or failure of the Sample Set completing.
A 'SampleSetCompleted' Job-State-Change message is posted to the Waters MessageBus.
            
Hidden Jobs - If a hidden job is detected then NoContent is returned, a Sample Set is not completed.

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation**

409.description:
Job end conflict- Incomplete streams found

Possible error codes: **IncompleteStreamFound**

500.description:
Internal server error

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

post.summary: Register task start details to the data store
post.description:
This data transfer event creates an injection entry within the Sample Set.
An 'InjectionStarted' Job-State-Change message is posted to the Waters MessageBus.
            
Hidden Jobs - If a hidden job is detected then NoContent is returned, Sample Set tasks are not started.

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation**

409.description:
Task start conflict, task already finalized.

Possible error codes: **TaskAlreadyFinalized**

500.description:
Internal server error

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

post.summary: The details of the task containg the date time when the collection of data is triggered on the task.
post.description:
Called to inform the system that the data acquisition is about to start.
An 'InjectionTriggered' Job-State-Change message is posted to the Waters MessageBus.

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation**

409.description:
Trigger Task conflict, task already finalized.

Possible error codes: **TaskAlreadyFinalized**

500.description:
Internal server error

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

post.summary: Handle Task-End request from Acquisition Controller
post.description:
This data transfer event closes the injection entry within the Sample Set.
An 'InjectionCompleted' Job-State-Change message is posted to the Waters MessageBus.
            
Hidden Jobs - If a hidden job is detected then NoContent is returned, Sample Set tasks are not ended.

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation**

409.description:
End Task conflict

Possible error codes: **TaskNotStarted, IncompleteStreamFound**

500.description:
Internal server error

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

post.summary: Register a channel to store result data.
post.description:
This data transfer event creates a channel entry within an open Sample Set.
Every channel must be registered before it is written to.

Hidden Jobs - If a hidden job is detected then NoContent is returned, a channel entry is not created.

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation**

409.description:
Register channel conflict

Possible error codes: **TaskAlreadyFinalized, TaskNotStarted**

500.description:
Internal server error

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

put.summary: Handle Write-Stream request from Acquisition Controller
put.description: This data transfer event writes injection data into the registered channel of the Sample Set.

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation**

409.description:
Write stream conflict

Possible error codes: **TaskAlreadyFinalized, TaskNotStarted, StreamWriteOffsetError, StreamContainerNotWritable**

500.description:
Internal Server Error.

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

post.summary: Handle finalize channel request from Acquisition Controller
post.description:
This data transfer event completes a channel entry within an open Sample Set

All completed streams will be CRC checked to verify the data's integrity.
If there is a discrepancy, the stream is deleted, and 
the failing stream ID is added to a list, and passed back.

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation**

404.description:
The channel was not found.

Possible error codes: **NotFound**

409.description:
Channel Finalize conflict

Possible error codes: **TaskAlreadyFinalized, TaskNotStarted, StreamNotFound, StreamChecksumFailure, CloseChannelInProgress**

500.description:
Internal Server Error.

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

post.description:
Job state changes received by the Event Receiver are published to the Waters MessageBus.
Events raised include JobStart, TaskStart, TaskEnd and JobEnd.

400.description: Some input was invalid. An accompanying error message will explain why.

403.description: The request is understood, but it has been refused or access is not allowed. An accompanying error message will explain why.

post.summary: Receives system queue state change data
post.description:
Queue state changes received by the Event Receiver are published to the Waters MessageBus.
Events raised include JobAdded, JobRemoved and JobActivated.

400.description: Some input was invalid. An accompanying error message will explain why.

post.description:
System state changes received by the Event Receiver are published to the Waters MessageBus.
Events raised include Idle, Busy and Error.

400.description: Some input was invalid. An accompanying error message will explain why.

post.summary: Post a message for an instrument system event

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation, InvalidAuditEntry**

403.description: The request is understood, but it has been refused due to missing or invalid certificate.

500.description:
Internal server error.

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

502.description:
One or more of the dependent services is not found or unreachable.

Possible error codes: **DependentServiceNotFound, DependentServiceUnreachable**

504.description:
One or more of the dependent services is running but is non-responsive. This may be caused by a service crash.

Possible error codes: **DependentServiceTimeout**

post.summary: Post a message for an instrument system event

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation, InvalidAuditEntry**

403.description: The request is understood, but it has been refused due to missing or invalid certificate.

500.description:
Internal server error.

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

502.description:
One or more of the dependent services is not found or unreachable.

Possible error codes: **DependentServiceNotFound, DependentServiceUnreachable**

504.description:
One or more of the dependent services is running but is non-responsive. This may be caused by a service crash.

Possible error codes: **DependentServiceTimeout**

post.summary: Post a message for an instrument system event

400.description:
The client request is not valid.

Possible error codes: **Validation, InvalidAuditEntry**

403.description: The request is understood, but it has been refused due to missing or invalid certificate.

500.description:
Internal server error.

Possible error codes: **InternalServerError**

502.description:
One or more of the dependent services is not found or unreachable.

Possible error codes: **DependentServiceNotFound, DependentServiceUnreachable**

504.description:
One or more of the dependent services is running but is non-responsive. This may be caused by a service crash.

Possible error codes: **DependentServiceTimeout**

Information sent when finalizing a channel transfer.
Contains Checksum info for comparison

Metadata.description: additional information passed by the acquisition controller relating to this channel

ChannelModel.description: Passed from Acquisition Controller when registering a channel

Id.description: A unique identifier for each message instance, generated for each message submission

SoftwareModule.description: The name of the software module which submitted the message. This should be a customer facing name.

SoftwareModuleVersion.description: The version of the software module which submitted the message.

MessageType.description: Type field for the message, used by API to determine how to process the message.

Summary.description: Brief summary of the message. Must be written in the language of the installation.

Message.description: The message itself. Must be written in the language of the installation.
Message.example: A sample set Sample Set B had been paused on InstrumentSystem01 for user johndoe

DateTime.description: The date time the notable action is generated (ISO 8601, UTC + offset)

UserId.description: The identifier of the user who triggered the message (e.g. submitted the job)

UserName.description: The username of the user who triggered the message (e.g. submitted the job)

ControllerName.description: Customer defined name of the acquisition controller at the time the audit entry was written.

InstrumentSystemName.description: Customer defined name of the instrument system at the time the audit entry was written.

InstrumentName.description: Customer defined name of the instrument at the time the audit entry was written.
